quotes.text: complexity very, very bad. say again: complexity very bad. you not smart enough to manage it, nobody is.
quotes.author: The Grug Brained Developer

quotes.text: grug wonder why big brain take simple monolith, split into 200 microservices, then mass mass effort to make work like monolith again.
quotes.author: The Grug Brained Developer

quotes.text: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth
quotes.source: Structured Programming with go to Statements, 1974

quotes.text: There are two ways of constructing a software design: One way is to make it so simple that there are obviously no deficiencies, and the other way is to make it so complicated that there are no obvious deficiencies. The first method is far more difficult.
quotes.author: C.A.R. Hoare
quotes.source: The Emperor's Old Clothes, 1980 Turing Award Lecture

quotes.text: I think that 'good taste' is much more about the ability to see and understand that simplicity — and to prefer it over cleverness.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: A little copying is better than a little dependency.
quotes.author: Rob Pike

quotes.text: Simple is not easy. Easy is near to our capabilities. Simple is about lack of interleaving. They are completely orthogonal.
quotes.author: Rich Hickey

quotes.text: I want the simplest possible thing that satisfies my actual requirements, and I want to understand every single line of it.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: Software is in decline. We are in a situation where we have systems that work less and less well, and we are building higher and higher on top of them.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: Each layer of abstraction is a layer of bugs, a layer of performance problems, and a layer of things you don't understand.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: 'Clean code' is just code that looks nice. But looking nice and being good are not the same thing at all.
quotes.author: Casey Muratori
quotes.source: Clean Code, Pair Programming, and Refactoring Debate, 2023

quotes.text: All non-trivial abstractions, to some degree, are leaky.
quotes.author: Joel Spolsky

quotes.text: The best code is no code at all. Every new line of code you willingly bring into the world is code that has to be debugged, code that has to be read and understood, code that has to be supported.
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood
quotes.source: The Best Code is No Code At All, 2007

quotes.text: More computing sins are committed in the name of efficiency (without necessarily achieving it) than for any other single reason — including blind stupidity.
quotes.author: W.A. Wulf

quotes.text: Duplication is far cheaper than the wrong abstraction.
quotes.author: Sandi Metz

quotes.text: Kubernetes: transforming the simple act of running a program into a 2000-line YAML existential crisis.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: All problems in computer science can be solved by another level of indirection... except for the problem of too many layers of indirection.
quotes.author: Butler Lampson (modified)
quotes.source: Attributed, with modification from David Wheeler's original

quotes.text: The difference between a junior and senior developer is that the senior developer writes FizzBuzz with 47 design patterns and a microservice architecture, then deletes it all and writes a for loop.
quotes.author: Unknown
